name: Aztec Corn Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 cups Fresh Corn, cut from cob
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 5-6 quart pan, melt butter over medium heat.
2. Add corn and garlic; cook, stirring, until corn is hot and darker golden in color (about 2 minutes).
3. Remove from heat. Whirl stock and 2 cups of the corn mixture in a food processor or blender until smooth; add to remaining corn mixture in pan.
4. Stir in milk, oregano, and chilies; bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly.
5. Remove from heat and stir in cheese. Season to taste with salt.
6. Garnish individual servings with tomato and cilantro. Makes 4-6 servings.
